name: Turkish Orange Cake with Fresh Tayberries Or
recipeInstructions:
1. Put one whole orange in a small saucepan and cover with water. Simmer for 2 hours, then pour away the liquid and let cool.
2. Preheat the oven to 180°C/350°F/Gas 4.
3. Grease a 23 cm/9 inch shallow cake tin and line with greaseproof paper.
4. Chop the cooked orange roughly, discard the pips, and blend including the skin.
5. Mix together ground almonds, sugar, baking powder, and almond extract in a bowl.
6. Beat the eggs with a fork, then beat in the liquidized orange. Pour into the bowl containing the other ingredients and mix well.
7. Pour this mixture into the prepared tin and sprinkle pine kernels on top.
8. Bake in the middle of the oven for 35 minutes, or until a skewer comes out clean. Let cool slightly.
9. Turn out onto a wire rack.
10. Just before serving, sprinkle the top of the cake with a little icing sugar. Serve in wedges with slices of orange and fresh tayberries or loganberries.
